text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me?
Trainer <username>?
Are you there?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good. I was hoping to give this to you in
person.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: It was just released today.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: The Twinkle Monthly Special Issue.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Recently, many readers have been requesting a
compilation of events in the racing world over the
past three years.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
So they surely also realize how impactful these
past three years have been.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: So many things have happened.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
As a reporter, I feel very fortunate to have been
able to cover these three years.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: And also that I was able to meet you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Oh, and one other thing...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Have you seen the cover?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Yes, take a look.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Otonashi's insistence, I look at the cover and
see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A large photo of <chrname> adorns
the front page.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
When I was trying to decide who should be the
face of this special edition...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Only one possible candidate came to mind.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
And that was the opinion of the editorial
department as well.
choice_data_list: I don't know what to say.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
We at Twinkle Monthly will continue covering
<chrname>'s exploits. And of course...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: We'll be following you with great interest as well.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
After all the interviews I've done to date, I'm
convinced you two are the light that will guide
the racing world forward.
choice_data_list: Then I'll make sure she shines even brighter!
Then I'll make sure she shines even brighter!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: That... Th-that's s-s-s...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Simply amazing!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
You want to make your trainee shine even
brighter! Even if it means you'll only be the
shadow behind her!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Dedicating all your time to her, all your money
even, and bringing her to races all around to
pursue her dreams!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Aah... You're just as amazing as I imagined you to
be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For whatever reason, Reporter Otonashi loses
control of her excitement, like always.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But this magazine conveys her true feelings. I'll be
sure to show it to <chrname> later!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
For this special edition, we tried something a
little different.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Hehe, please flip towards the back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Otonashi's insistence, I flip to the back half of
the magazine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And there I see...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
"Dear <chrname> and
Trainer <username>."

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
You see, the editorial department has received
no small number of fan letters from readers
addressed to the two of you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that enthusiasm, we decided to create a
special section displaying all those words of
support.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
This is pretty much the first time we've devoted
multiple pages solely to letters from our readers.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Please be sure to convey that gratitude to
all the fans you see at races and concerts.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
If I'm able to help connect you two with your fans,
it means I'm doing my job as a reporter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This article conveys Reporter Otonashi's true
feelings. I'll be sure to show it to
<chrname> later!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Could you please skip a few pages ahead?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Yes, take a look.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Otonashi's insistence, I flip back a few pages
and see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A special feature titled "Pursuing Glory with
<chrname> and Her Trainer."

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
It's impossible to talk about the last three years
of Umamusume racing without bringing up you
two.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Your story deserved much more than a small
article. So, I did a little negotiating with the
editor-in-chief.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I knew all our readers would be excited to see a
special feature on you two.
choice_data_list: I don't know what to say.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Of course, I'm no exception. I’m more
excited than anyone to see your future exploits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This article conveys Reporter Otonashi's true
feelings. I'll be sure to show it to
<chrname> later!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Have you looked at the right side of that page
yet?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Yes, take a look.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a small special feature titled "A Promising
Trainer and Trainee."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It includes scenes of my training sessions with
<chrname> along with Otonashi's
enthusiastic comments.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
"I can't wait to see how far these two can go!"
...And I meant every word.
choice_data_list: I don't know what to say.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I intend to continue covering the path you
both take from here on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This article conveys Reporter Otonashi's true
feelings. I'll be sure to show it to
<chrname> later!
